module.name: roadmap
module.description: Horizontal roadmap of phases along an arrow. Body = one section per phase (split by "<!-- @ -->"): first line = phase title, rest = Markdown items.
module.aiSpec:
A horizontal ROADMAP — phases (quarters, milestones, releases) laid left-to-right along an arrow. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one PHASE per section. In a phase, the FIRST line is the title (e.g. Q1, MVP) and the rest is Markdown (a short bullet list of deliverables). Use @steps or @process instead for a step-by-step procedure rather than a time/phase plan.
Parameters: `active` — 1-based index of the phase to highlight (default 0 = none highlighted). `color` — accent colour for dots, titles and (unless overridden) the arrow (default theme accent). `linecolor` — CSS colour override for the connecting arrow line only (default blank = a faded accent). `numbered` — true | false (default false): show the phase number inside each dot. `compact` — true | false (default false): tighter columns and smaller body text. `align` — left | center (default left): text alignment of each phase's body.
Example: <!-- @roadmap active: 2, numbered: true, color: #10b981 --> Q1 — Foundation - Auth - Data model <!-- @ --> Q2 — Beta - Public beta <!-- @ --> Q3 — Launch - GA release <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Accent color
param.desc: Dots, titles and the arrow line (theme accent by default).

param.name: linecolor
param.label: Arrow line color
param.desc: Overrides just the connecting arrow; blank = faded accent.

param.name: numbered
param.label: Numbered dots
param.desc: Show the phase number inside each dot.

param.name: compact
param.label: Compact
param.desc: Tighter columns and smaller body text.

param.name: align
param.label: Body align
param.desc: Text alignment of each phase's body.

snippet.label: Roadmap (phases)
snippet.text: <!-- @roadmap active: 2 --> **Q1** — Foundation - Auth & data model <!-- @ --> **Q2** — Beta - Public beta <!-- @ --> **Q3** — Launch - GA release <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Phases along an arrow, left to right; active: n highlights one.

snippet.label: Roadmap (numbered, compact)
snippet.text: <!-- @roadmap active: 1, numbered: true, compact: true --> **Discovery** - Interviews <!-- @ --> **Design** - Prototypes <!-- @ --> **Delivery** - Ship v1 <!-- @end -->
